## What & why

## Checklist (CLAUDE.md §17–18)

- [ ] Lint/format/typecheck pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] No secrets / real customer-like data in diff
- [ ] Migrations: single head, up/down tested (if applicable)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if config changed)
- [ ] New endpoints: auth + RBAC + input validation (if applicable)
- [ ] Audit logging for state changes (if applicable)
- [ ] UI: light + dark screenshots attached (if applicable)
